title: Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission (MRC) Annual Report FY2023
description: Official annual report of the Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission (MRC) for state fiscal year 2023 (July 1, 2022 – June 30, 2023), the last annual report published under the MRC name before its September 2024 rebrand to MassAbility. Covers Career Services, Home & Community Life, and Disability Determination Services (DDS), with program activity and divisional funding. Prose report converted to Markdown.

source.title: Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission Annual Report FY2023

notes: Published under the MRC name; the agency rebranded to MassAbility in September 2024. This report covers the fiscal year immediately preceding the rebrand.
